This is the project proposal!

Read the data set:

```{r}
df <- read.csv("diabetes_binary_5050split_health_indicators_BRFSS2015.csv")
```

PROJECT PROPOSAL RESPONSE

1. Project title: People with Diabetes

2. Names of everyone in the group:

- Henry Tan ht492
- Casper Liao cl2622

3. One sentence describing the dataset and url link to the dataset (e.g. webscraped data of Ithaca restaurants on Yelp, or county-level income data downloaded from the US census bureau website, etc)

The Diabetes Health Indicators Dataset contains healthcare statistics and lifestyle survey information about people in general along with their diagnosis of diabetes.

Link: https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/annual_data/annual_2014.html


4. One or two questions about the dataset you will answer in the project, preferably one.

Question: What kind of group of people (combination of other health characteristics) has a higher chance of getting diabetes?

5. The head of the dataset (first 6 lines). 

```{r}
head(df)
```
